title: EVT.BSP.004.ENVELOPE_CONSUMED — Budget envelope consumed (design-time documentation)
description: DESIGN-TIME DOCUMENTATION ONLY. This schema describes the abstract business fact 'a budget envelope has been partially or fully consumed within the period limits' at the meta-model level (business event, per ADR-BCM-URBA-0007). PER ADR-TECH-STRAT-001 RULE 2, NO AUTONOMOUS BUS MESSAGE CORRESPONDS TO THIS SCHEMA. Only the paired resource event RVT.BSP.004.CONSUMPTION_RECORDED generates wire-level messages on RabbitMQ. This file exists for: (a) traceability of the BCM business-event meta-model into a machine-readable artifact, (b) governance review, (c) consumer documentation describing the abstract fact independently of its wire-level projection. DO NOT publish payloads validated against this schema on the bus. The wire-level contract is RVT.BSP.004.CONSUMPTION_RECORDED.schema.json. The business event name 'EVT.BSP.004.ENVELOPE_CONSUMED' appears exclusively as the prefix of the routing key (Rule 4): 'EVT.BSP.004.ENVELOPE_CONSUMED.RVT.BSP.004.CONSUMPTION_RECORDED'. Correlation key: 'identifiant_dossier' — resolution toward OBJ.REF.001.BENEFICIARY_RECORD.identifiant_interne is the consumer's responsibility via CAP.REF.001.BEN.

identifiant_dossier.description: CORRELATION KEY. Reference to the relevant participation case. Resolution path to OBJ.REF.001.BENEFICIARY_RECORD.identifiant_interne via CAP.REF.001.BEN is the consumer's concern.

categorie.description: Spending category covered by this envelope (OBJ.BSP.004.ALLOCATION.categorie). Canonical source per tier: CAP.REF.001.PAL.

montant_plafond.description: Maximum amount authorised for the period (OBJ.BSP.004.ALLOCATION.montant_plafond).

montant_consomme.description: Amount actually spent to date (OBJ.BSP.004.ALLOCATION.montant_consomme). Domain rule: 0 <= montant_consomme <= montant_plafond.

periode_debut.description: Start of the allocation period in ISO-8601 format (OBJ.BSP.004.ALLOCATION.periode_debut).

periode_fin.description: End of the allocation period in ISO-8601 format (OBJ.BSP.004.ALLOCATION.periode_fin).

statut.description: Status of the allocation (OBJ.BSP.004.ALLOCATION.statut). OUVERTE = open and accepting consumptions; EPUISEE = cap reached; NON_CONSOMMEE = period ended without consumption.
